raw.name: slack_list_channels
raw.description: List public or pre-defined channels in the workspace with pagination

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 200)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

raw.name: slack_post_message
raw.description: Post a new message to a Slack channel

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel to post to

raw.name: slack_reply_to_thread
raw.description: Reply to a specific message thread in Slack

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message in the format '1234567890.123456'. Timestamps in the format without the period can be converted by adding the period such that 6 numbers come after it.

raw.name: slack_add_reaction
raw.description: Add a reaction emoji to a message

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the message

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the message to react to

reaction.description: The name of the emoji reaction (without ::)

raw.name: slack_get_channel_history
raw.description: Get recent messages from a channel

raw.name: slack_get_thread_replies
raw.description: Get all replies in a message thread

channel_id.description: The ID of the channel containing the thread

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message in the format '1234567890.123456'. Timestamps in the format without the period can be converted by adding the period such that 6 numbers come after it.

raw.name: slack_get_users
raw.description: Get a list of all users in the workspace with their basic profile information

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

limit.description: Maximum number of users to return (default 100, max 200)

raw.name: slack_get_user_profile
raw.description: Get detailed profile information for a specific user
